knownIssues: Secret Rares often have centering issues — check front/back
Holofoil surface prone to micro-scratches from pack collation
Foil waves common on Secret Rares in warm/humid climates
one-piece-op01.psa10Tips: Centering must be 60/40 or better. Check surface scratches under direct light before buying.
one-piece-op01.printNotes: OP-01 EN has better quality control than JP OP-01 first print run

one-piece-op05.setName: One Piece OP-05 Awakening of the New Era
knownIssues: Manga Alt Arts have near-perfect print quality — one of the best sets
Minor edge wear from packaging is common
one-piece-op05.psa10Tips: High grade rate set. Just check edges and centering — surface is usually clean.

yugioh-lob-1st.setName: Yu-Gi-Oh Legend of Blue Eyes White Dragon 1st Edition
knownIssues: 25+ year old cards — whitening on card edges very common
Print lines on card face are period-authentic but count against grade
Card stock thinner than modern sets — susceptible to bends
Centering notoriously bad on 1st edition print run
yugioh-lob-1st.psa10Tips: Avoid unless you can physically inspect. Centering needs to be near-perfect. PSA 10 rate ~5-8% for LOB 1st Ed.

knownIssues: Same vintage print issues as LOB
Edge wear and whitening common
Dark Hole and Raigeki print centering issues
yugioh-mrd-1st.psa10Tips: Same vintage caution as LOB. Buy only if you can inspect in person or get video.

knownIssues: Centering on Holo Rares is notoriously bad — check front AND back
Print lines on Charizard face are a known PSA dock
Indentation marks from packaging on card surface
Surface scratches on holo foil are almost universal on ungraded copies
pokemon-base-1st.psa10Tips: Gem Mint 1st Ed Base Charizard is under 5% grade rate. Expect PSA 9 at best on most copies.

knownIssues: Centering still problematic but better than 1st Ed
Surface scratches on holo foil common
Whitening on card edges from shelf/binder storage
pokemon-base-unlimited.psa10Tips: PSA 10 rate ~8-12% for Charizard Unlimited. Surface and centering are the killers.

knownIssues: Machine sorting scratches from pack collation
Boil effect on cards from pack-fresh humidity
pokemon-modern.psa10Tips: Pull from pack, sleeve immediately, only submit gem-looking copies. Grade rate 20-35% depending on set.

knownIssues: Relatively new set — limited PSA population data
Weiß Schwarz cards generally grade well (smooth stock)
dandadan.psa10Tips: New set, check surface and centering. WS stock is reliable.
